subject: Fermi GBM trigger 422752719/ 140525971 is not a GRB
body:
V. Pelassa (UAH), reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 422752719/ 140525971
at 23:18:36.74 UT on 25 May 2014, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
